x.text: On July 20, I will be joining the “Civil Society on the Digital Frontline: Facing Digital Threats Together” panel organized by @OcfTaiwan remotely. Looking forward to discussing civil society, human rights, and digital security with the other speakers.

linkedin.text: I’m honored to join the "Civil Society on the Digital Frontline: Facing Digital Threats Together" panel remotely and contribute to an important discussion on civil society, human rights, and digital security.
